title: Intercompany Basketball Tournament
description: A full-day intercompany basketball tournament with round-robin group stage and knockout finals. Open to corporate teams of 12 players. Referees, scorekeepers, and trophies provided.

title: Corporate Volleyball League — Season 3
description: Six-week volleyball league running every Saturday. Teams of 8. Full officiating, stats tracking, and end-of-season awards night included.

title: Team Building Olympics
description: A full-day outdoor team building event structured as a mini Olympics — tug of war, relay races, trivia challenges, and more. Perfect for departments of 30–150 people.

title: Annual Sportsfest 2025
description: Our flagship annual sportsfest featuring 8 sports disciplines and over 40 corporate teams. Three days of competition, camaraderie, and celebration.

title: Year-End Awards Night 2025
description: Elegant awards night for 300 guests. Full event production including AV setup, lighting design, MC, programme flow, and coordination with venue and catering.

title: 5K Fun Run — Health & Wellness Day
description: Company-wide 5K fun run with race kits, timing chips, finisher medals, and post-race breakfast. Managed from registration to finish line.
